title: Adult Basic Education, Adult Secondary Education, and English as a Second Language Instructors
description: Teach or instruct out-of-school youths and adults in basic education, literacy, or English as a Second Language classes, or in classes for earning a high school equivalency credential.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate students' work to determine progress and make suggestions for improvement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Observe students to determine qualifications, limitations, abilities, interests, and other individual characteristics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish clear objectives for all lessons, units, and projects and communicate those objectives to students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adapt teaching methods and instructional materials to meet students' varying needs, abilities, and interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare students for further education by encouraging them to explore learning opportunities and to persevere with challenging tasks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare materials and classrooms for class activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct students individually and in groups, using various teaching methods, such as lectures, discussions, and demonstrations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct activities for a balanced program of instruction, demonstration, and work time that provides students with opportunities to observe, question, and investigate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign and grade class work and homework.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain accurate and complete student records as required by laws or administrative policies.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Conduct classes, workshops, and demonstrations to teach principles, techniques, or methods in subjects, such as basic English language skills, life skills, and workforce entry skills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and enforce rules for behavior and procedures for maintaining order among the students for whom they are responsible.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and administer written, oral, and performance tests and issue grades in accordance with performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and implement remedial programs for students requiring extra help.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare for assigned classes and show written evidence of preparation upon request of immediate supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enforce administration policies and rules governing students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use computers, audio-visual aids, and other equipment and materials to supplement presentations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare objectives and outlines for courses of study, following curriculum guidelines or requirements of states and schools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on students and activities as required by administration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review instructional content, methods, and student evaluations to assess strengths and weaknesses, and to develop recommendations for course revision, development, or elimination.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Register, orient, and assess new students according to standards and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other teachers and professionals in the development of instructional programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend staff meetings and serve on committees, as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with other professionals to discuss individual students' needs and progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Guide and counsel students with adjustment or academic problems or special academic interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select, order, and issue books, materials, and supplies for courses or projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend professional meetings, conferences, and workshops to maintain and improve professional competence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other staff members to plan and schedule lessons that promote learning, following approved curricula.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and supervise class projects, field trips, visits by guest speakers, contests, or other experiential activities, and guide students in learning from those activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide students with disabilities with assistive devices, supportive technology, and assistance accessing facilities, such as restrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide information, guidance, and preparation for the General Equivalency Diploma (GED) examination.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select and schedule class times to ensure maximum attendance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train and assist tutors and community literacy volunteers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate the performance of other instructors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with leaders of government and community groups to coordinate student training or to find opportunities for students to fulfill curriculum requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in publicity planning, community awareness efforts, and student recruitment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise students on internships, prospective employers, and job placement services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
